summary: Iteration 18: Shift vs Operations feature block fully tested. Backend 100% pass (15/15 tests). Frontend 100% pass - all UI elements verified.

shift_overview_endpoint.returns: revenue, tables_closed, avg_ticket, staff_cost, result, status, period

staff_costs_endpoint.returns: total_cost and staff breakdown with name, role, hourly_rate, hours_worked, earned

shift_history_endpoint.returns: per-day performance with date, day_name, revenue, staff_cost, tabs_closed, result, status

shift_chart_endpoint.returns: chart data with date, label, revenue, cost per day

shift_snapshot_endpoint.function: Saves staff cost snapshot for rate preservation

shift_ai_endpoint.returns: AI analysis with insight (summary, what_we_see, recommended_actions, reference, classification) and disclaimer

verified: Shift vs Ops tab in Manager sidebar
5 KPI cards (Revenue, Tables Closed, Staff Cost, Avg Ticket, Net Result with status badge)
Staff Earnings table with editable rates (pencil icon)
Customize button opens Custom Roles panel
Day Performance History table with status badges
Period filters (Today, 7 Days, 30 Days, Year, Custom)
AI Shift Analysis section with input and Analyze button

regression_tests.manager_staff: PASS - Staff section loads, Add Staff button present
regression_tests.tables_by_server: PASS - Shows 2 servers with grouped tables

seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing demo data (3 staff: Carlos Silva, Ana Perez, Marco Rossi at $15/hr)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shift vs Operations feature fully working. Backend has all shift-ops endpoints. Frontend shows KPIs (Revenue/Tables/Cost/Avg/Result), Staff Earnings with edit buttons, Custom Roles CRUD, Day Performance History, Revenue vs Cost chart, and AI Analysis using real GPT-5.2. AI takes 10-20 seconds to respond. Demo data shows negative result (-$518) due to low revenue ($22) vs high staff cost ($540). One custom role 'Head Bartender' at $22/hr exists.
ai_note: AI Shift Analysis uses REAL GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations - NO MOCKING. Generates classification (healthy/tight/underperforming), summary, what_we_see, recommended_actions.
